name: Arata Corporation
summary: Arata Corporation engages in the wholesale of daily goods and cosmetics in Japan. The company offers health and beauty products, including cosmetics, hair and body care, and healthcare products; household detergents, such as clothing detergents, home-related cleaners, and dishwashing and kitchen detergents; home care products, including insecticides, air fresheners and deodorizers, and batteries; paper products, which include tissues, toilet paper, and disposable diapers; and home goods comprising kitchen supplies, cleaning equipment, and cooking implements. It is also involved in the wholesale of pet food and accessories, perfumed soaps, tooth pastes, food and beverages, textile products, and miscellaneous goods; and store management activities. Arata Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
